title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server that lets you pull, create, and run large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple REST/HTTP API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push, create, and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider for chat, generation, and embedding pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list, delete, and stream responses in JVM apps.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple idiomatic interface to chat and generate with local models.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI wrapper with prompt templates, conversation history, and shell completions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight React chatbot frontend that talks to your local Ollama instance over REST.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-use Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with WebUI, PostgreSQL pgvector, and RAG examples.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that reproducibly builds Ollama server and exposes it as a NixOS module.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming, chat, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client for Ollama demonstrating HTTP requests and JSON parsing in Zig.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app that exposes Ollama models via Django REST framework with streaming SSE endpoints.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI microservice template that proxies and extends Ollama with JWT auth, rate limits, and OpenAI-style endpoints.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord.py bot that lets server members chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.
